title: Bridge Essay: Ayahuasca Therapy: Possible Reduction of Suicidal Ideation in Treatment-Resistan

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Nonordinary Rendering** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Nonordinary states as controlled experiments in consciousness — predictive processing breakdown and revision.

**Ayahuasca Therapy: Possible Reduction of Suicidal Ideation in Treatment-Resistant Depression - A Systematic Review.**. Journal of psychoactive drugs.. PMID: 42023657. DOI: 10.1080/02791072.2026.2661580. Suicide, particularly in treatment-resistant depression (TRD), remains apressing global health issue, with over 700,000 annual deaths. Existing treatments often have limited efficacy and delayed onset, creating aneed for rapid-acting interventions. Ayahuasca, atraditional Amazonian psychedelic, has shown potential for rapidly reducing suicidal ideation. Our systematic review evaluated the clinical evidence regarding ayahuasca'seffects on suicidality. From 6,633 initial records, five studies...
